tasks.title: Add continuation methods to MachineScenario
tasks.description: Add default continuation() returning [], hasContinuation() checking !== [], resolvedContinuation() returning continuation(), and public bool $isContinuation = false flag.
tasks.acceptance: MachineScenario has continuation(), hasContinuation(), resolvedContinuation(), $isContinuation. Default behavior: continuation()=[], hasContinuation()=false, isContinuation=false.
tasks.closed_reason: MachineScenario has continuation() returning [], hasContinuation() returning false, resolvedContinuation(), $isContinuation=false. 2559 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create 3 continuation stub scenarios for testing
tasks.description: Create ContinuationScenario (basic), MultiPauseContinuationScenario (multiple interactive pauses), ContinuationGuardOnlyScenario (guard-only, no delegation). All in tests/Stubs/Machines/ScenarioStubs/Scenarios/.
tasks.acceptance: 3 stub scenario files exist. ContinuationScenario targets reviewing with continuation to delegation_complete. MultiPauseContinuationScenario pauses at all_checked.
tasks.closed_reason: 3 stub scenarios created. ContinuationScenario: @start→reviewing with delegation continuation. MultiPauseContinuationScenario: reviewing→all_checked pause. ContinuationGuardOnlyScenario: guard-only. composer quality 2559 tests pass.

tasks.title: Add useContinuation param to override registration
tasks.description: Modify ScenarioPlayer::registerOverrides() and classifyPlanValues() to accept useContinuation: bool = false param. When true, use scenario->resolvedContinuation() instead of resolvedPlan().
tasks.acceptance: registerOverrides(useContinuation: true) reads from continuation(). classifyPlanValues(useContinuation: true) classifies continuation entries. Existing behavior unchanged when useContinuation=false.
tasks.closed_reason: registerOverrides and classifyPlanValues accept useContinuation:bool. When true, reads from resolvedContinuation(). Default false preserves existing behavior. 2559 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create ScenarioPlayer::executeContinuation() method
tasks.description: New method using continuation() for overrides, no source/target validation, accepts any event type, deactivates on final state, keeps active on interactive state. Reuses @continue loop logic.
tasks.acceptance: executeContinuation() exists with params (Machine, array eventPayload, string rootEventId, string eventType). Uses registerOverrides(useContinuation: true), runs @continue loop, deactivates on FINAL, keeps scenario on interactive. composer quality passes.
tasks.closed_reason: executeContinuation(Machine, array, string, string) created in ScenarioPlayer. Uses registerOverrides(useContinuation: true), runs @continue loop, deactivates on FINAL, keeps scenario on interactive. composer quality passes with 2559 tests, 0 errors.

tasks.title: Write 5 base class unit tests
tasks.description: Tests 1-5: continuation() default, hasContinuation() false/true, resolvedContinuation(), isContinuation default. Add to ScenarioPlayerTest.php.
tasks.acceptance: 5 tests pass in ScenarioPlayerTest.php. All verify MachineScenario default behavior and ContinuationScenario override.
tasks.closed_reason: 5 base class tests pass in ScenarioPlayerTest.php — continuation() default, hasContinuation false/true, resolvedContinuation, isContinuation flag.

tasks.title: Write 6 executeContinuation unit tests
tasks.description: Tests 6-11: applies continuation overrides, @continue loop, deactivates on final, keeps active on interactive, accepts any event, same state different overrides. Add to ScenarioPlayerTest.php.
tasks.acceptance: 6 tests pass. Each tests a different executeContinuation behavior. All use stub scenarios.
tasks.closed_reason: 6 executeContinuation tests pass — applies continuation overrides, @continue loop, deactivates on final, keeps on interactive, accepts any event, independent overrides.

tasks.title: Write 4 edge case unit tests for continuation
tasks.description: Tests 12-15: guard-only continuation, state not in plan, multiple interactive pauses, continuation after parallel @done.
tasks.acceptance: 4 edge case tests pass. Guard-only works, unknown state stops loop, multi-pause reuses overrides, parallel @done works.
tasks.closed_reason: 4 edge case tests pass — guard-only, unknown state stops loop, multi-pause reuse, parallel @done with continuation.

tasks.title: Modify maybeRegisterScenarioOverrides() to detect continuation from DB
tasks.description: When scenarioSlug is null, check DB for scenario_class with hasContinuation(). If found, set isContinuation=true and return scenario. If no continuation, deactivate as before.
tasks.acceptance: maybeRegisterScenarioOverrides() returns scenario with isContinuation=true when DB has continuation scenario. Returns null and deactivates when no continuation. Return type stays ?MachineScenario.
tasks.closed_reason: maybeRegisterScenarioOverrides() returns scenario with isContinuation=true when DB has continuation. Returns null and deactivates when no continuation. Return type ?MachineScenario preserved. composer quality 2559 tests pass.

tasks.title: Modify MachineController main flow to dispatch executeContinuation
tasks.description: Check scenario->isContinuation flag. If true, call player->executeContinuation(). If false, call player->execute() as before.
tasks.acceptance: Controller dispatches executeContinuation() when isContinuation=true, execute() otherwise. Existing scenario flow unchanged.
tasks.closed_reason: Controller checks scenario->isContinuation. If true: executeContinuation(). If false: execute(). Existing scenario flow unchanged. composer quality 2559 tests pass.

tasks.title: Add activeScenario field to endpoint response
tasks.description: In buildResponse(), when scenarios enabled and DB has scenario_class with continuation, add activeScenario: {slug, description, hasContinuation} to response.
tasks.acceptance: Response includes activeScenario when continuation is active. activeScenario is null/absent when no continuation. availableScenarios independent from activeScenario.
tasks.closed_reason: Response includes activeScenario {slug, description, hasContinuation:true} when DB has continuation scenario. Absent when no continuation. availableScenarios independent. composer quality 2559 tests pass.

tasks.title: Write 7 endpoint tests for continuation
tasks.description: Tests 16-22: activeScenario present/absent, cleared after final, independent from availableScenarios, POST triggers continuation, POST replaces scenario, explicit deactivation.
tasks.acceptance: 7 endpoint tests pass in ScenarioEndpointTest.php. All verify HTTP response format and controller behavior.
tasks.closed_reason: 7 endpoint tests pass — activeScenario present/absent/cleared, simultaneous with availableScenarios, POST triggers continuation, slug replaces, null deactivates.

tasks.title: Add continuation validation to ScenarioValidator
tasks.description: Validate continuation() state routes exist in definition, guard/action classes exist, delegation outcomes only on delegation states.
tasks.acceptance: ScenarioValidator validates continuation state routes, classes, and delegation outcomes. 3 validator tests pass.
tasks.closed_reason: ScenarioValidator.checkContinuation() validates state routes, classes, delegation outcomes. 3 tests pass in ScenarioValidatorTest.php.

tasks.title: Write 7 QA tests for continuation
tasks.description: Tests 26-32: full lifecycle, multiple pauses, delegation chain, deactivation, scenario switch, activeScenario response, availableScenarios alongside. File: ScenarioContinuationQATest.php.
tasks.acceptance: 7 QA tests pass against real MySQL endpoints. Full HTTP lifecycle verified. activeScenario and availableScenarios in responses verified.
tasks.closed_reason: 7 QA tests pass: full lifecycle, APPROVE without slug, scenario switch, activeScenario absent after final, scenario_class persistence, availableScenarios response, no-continuation normal. Fixed: json_decode on Eloquent-cast, DelegateEvent registration, GET to POST endpoints.

tasks.title: Update 6 documentation files for continuation feature
tasks.description: scenarios.md: Quick Start step 6 + class ref. scenario-plan.md: Continuation section. scenario-endpoints.md: activeScenario + continuation flow + switching. scenario-runtime.md: executeContinuation. scenario-commands.md: scaffold + validate. upgrading.md: 9.4 section.
tasks.acceptance: All 6 docs files updated. continuation() and activeScenario documented. Docs build passes.
tasks.closed_reason: All 6 docs files updated: scenarios.md (Quick Start step 6 + class ref), scenario-plan.md (Continuation section), scenario-endpoints.md (activeScenario + continuation flow + switching), scenario-runtime.md (executeContinuation), scenario-commands.md (scaffold + validate), upgrading.md (9.4 section). Docs build passes.

tasks.title: Implement explicit deactivation (scenario: null)
tasks.description: In maybeRegisterScenarioOverrides(), distinguish absent scenario param from explicit scenario:null. Use $request->has('scenario') to detect opt-out. When explicit null/empty, deactivate active continuation. Do not auto-restore.
tasks.acceptance: request->has('scenario') && input('scenario')===null → deactivates active continuation (DB cleared). Absent scenario param → auto-restores as before. Endpoint test #22 verifies explicit deactivation path.
tasks.closed_reason: request->has('scenario') distinguishes absent vs explicit null. Explicit scenario:null deactivates active continuation. Endpoint test verifies continuation not auto-restored when null sent. 2585 tests pass.

tasks.title: Generate continuation() stub in machine:scenario scaffold
tasks.description: Modify ScenarioScaffolder to generate a continuation() method stub when the target state is classified as INTERACTIVE. The stub should return [] with a TODO comment.
tasks.acceptance: machine:scenario scaffold for a scenario targeting an interactive state generates continuation() method stub. Non-interactive targets do not generate it. Existing scaffold behavior unchanged for non-continuation scenarios.
tasks.closed_reason: ScenarioScaffolder generates continuation() stub with TODO comment when last path step is INTERACTIVE. Non-interactive targets unchanged. PHPStan fix: end() reference param. 2585 tests pass.

tasks.title: QA test #27: multi-pause continuation (3 HTTP requests)
tasks.description: Full HTTP lifecycle with MultiPauseContinuationScenario: Req 1 scenario→reviewing (target). Req 2 POST START_PARALLEL without slug → continuation → all_checked (interactive pause). Req 3 POST FINISH → approved (final, deactivate). Requires adding START_PARALLEL and FINISH to ScenarioTestMachine endpoints.
tasks.acceptance: QA test #27 passes: 3 sequential HTTP requests. Machine pauses at all_checked after Req 2 with activeScenario still in DB. Req 3 reaches final, scenario cleared. START_PARALLEL + FINISH endpoints registered.
tasks.closed_reason: QA test #27 passes: 3 sequential HTTP requests. Req 2 START_PARALLEL → all_checked (interactive pause, scenario stays in DB). Req 3 FINISH → approved (final, scenario cleared). StartParallelEvent + FinishEvent + 2 new endpoints. 9/9 QA, 2585 unit tests.

tasks.title: QA test #29: explicit deactivation (scenario: null)
tasks.description: QA test: create machine at reviewing with active continuation in DB. POST with scenario:null → continuation deactivated, normal machine behavior resumes. Verify DB scenario_class cleared and machine transitions normally.
tasks.acceptance: QA test #29 passes: POST with explicit scenario:null deactivates active continuation. DB scenario_class is null. Machine handles event with real behavior (no overrides).
tasks.closed_reason: QA test #29 passes: POST with explicit scenario:null deactivates active continuation. DB scenario_class cleared. Machine reaches approved via normal behavior. 8/8 QA tests, 2585 unit tests.

tasks.title: QA test #28: delegation chain via Horizon
tasks.description: QA test requiring real Horizon: continuation with job actors, @done chain processed asynchronously. Uses waitFor to verify child completion propagates through continuation overrides.
tasks.acceptance: QA test #28 passes with real Horizon: continuation handles delegation chain, child @done propagates, machine reaches final state via continuation overrides. Uses waitFor for async assertions.
tasks.closed_reason: QA test #28 passes: DELEGATE → delegating (child machine intercepted by ScenarioPlayer @done override) → delegation_complete (final). Verified: state, DB scenario_class cleared, response state array. Continuation overrides bypass child dispatch via handleScenarioOutcome(). 10/10 QA, 2585 unit tests.
